holdings.infoBox: GUSA is an equity ETF with a total of 1012 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.94%, Apple at 6.13%, Microsoft at 4.13%, Amazon.com at 3.38%, and Alphabet at 3.11%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs MarketBeta U.S. 1000 Equity ETF (GUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive GBS United States 1000 index. The fund tracks an index of 1,000 US large-cap companies selected and weighted by market-cap. GUSA was launched on Apr 5, 2022 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
